Title: New insight into the molecular mechanism of colour differentiation among floral segments in orchids

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: flower coloration for pollinator attraction and ornamental value
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Associated with colour differentiation between lip segments and perianths; higher AP3-1/4 in epichile associates with purple-red colour, higher AP3-2 in hypochile associates with yellow colour
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RNA-seq expression profiling; WGCNA coexpression analysis; qRT-PCR; analysis of peloric mutant M1
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AP3-like genes showed spatiotemporal segment-specific expression during floral development. 2. AP3-1/4 expression was higher in the purple-red epichile, whereas AP3-2 expression was higher in the yellow hypochile. 3. AP3-1/4 were coexpressed with CBP genes and expression changed in the peloric mutant along with pigment loss, suggesting participation in colour differentiation.
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: The study proposes participation in colour pattern formation but does not directly prove AP3 genes regulate pigment pathway genes; they are organ-identity genes with indirect/associated effects.
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: AP3-1 expressed in perianths and lip at D7-D8; AP3-4 highly expressed mainly at D8; AP3-2 and AP3-3 expressed at D1-D4, with AP3-2 highest in hypochile
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential targets to couple floral shape and colour pattern breeding in orchids, but mechanistic links to pigment pathways need direct validation
Common_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: May alter floral organ identity and shape, as suggested by peloric mutant association
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Natural floral developmental stages D1-D8; greenhouse natural light, 24-30 °C
Common_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq, SRA: PRJNA559603; Iso-Seq, SRA: PRJNA559608

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: flower coloration for pollinator attraction and ornamental value
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Associated with lip/perianth colour differentiation; AGL6-2 expression is higher in hypochile and correlates with yellow coloration and RcPCP1/BCH1 expression
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RNA-seq expression profiling; WGCNA coexpression analysis; qRT-PCR; peloric mutant M1 comparison
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AGL6-1 was highly expressed in perianths at early stages, while AGL6-2 was expressed in lip tissues at all stages and higher in hypochile. 2. AGL6-2 was coexpressed with BCH1s and RcPCP1. 3. Reduced AGL6-2 expression in peloric mutant coincided with reduced yellow/red pigmentation, supporting participation in colour differentiation.
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Evidence is correlative/proposed rather than direct transactivation of pigment pathway genes in this study.
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: AGL6-1 high in perianths at D1-D4; AGL6-2 expressed in lip at all stages and higher in hypochile than epichile
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential marker/target for engineering coordinated floral organ identity and colour pattern in ornamental orchids
Common_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Manipulation may alter floral organ identity and morphology
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Natural floral developmental stages D1-D8; greenhouse natural light, 24-30 °C
Common_Genes.Interacting_Proteins: AP3-like proteins (proposed developmental combinations); RcPCP1/BCH1 coexpression only
Common_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq, SRA: PRJNA559603; Iso-Seq, SRA: PRJNA559608

Regulation_Genes.Applied_Species: Orchid (Rhyncholaeliocattleya hybrid 'KOVA'); transient assay in Phalaenopsis hybrid
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: purple-red floral coloration for pollinator attraction and ornamental value
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Activates ABP structural genes; in transient assay upregulated PeF3H to PeANS
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: ABP structural genes including F3H; F3'H; DFR; ANS
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes anthocyanin accumulation and purple-red pigmentation, especially in the epichile before flowering
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Epichile-specific activator associated with strong early anthocyanin accumulation causing purple-red lip coloration
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Phylogenetic analysis; RNA-seq expression profiling; WGCNA coexpression; qRT-PCR; transient overexpression in Phalaenopsis hybrid; anthocyanin quantification
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. RcPAP1 clustered with subgroup 6 R2R3-MYBs related to anthocyanin activators. 2. RcPAP1 expression was highly specific to epichile at D4, matching strong ABP activation and purple-red coloration. 3. Transient overexpression increased anthocyanin accumulation and upregulated ABP genes in Phalaenopsis petals.
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Highly expressed only in epichile at D4 before flowering
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Highly expressed only in epichile at D4
Regulation_Genes.Interacting_Proteins: bHLH; WD40 (proposed MBW complex, not directly validated)
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Likely acts in MBW complex with bHLH and WD40, inferred from discussion
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Developmental stage-specific floral segment identity cues; possible distinct activators not identified
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Floral developmental stage; transient Agrobacterium-mediated overexpression in Phalaenopsis petals
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: RcPAP1 and RcPAP2 behaved similarly in transient assay, but distinct spatial expression suggests different developmental roles; direct binding targets were not tested.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful for engineering strong purple-red pigmentation in orchid floral segments through stage/segment-specific expression
Regulation_Genes.Applied_Promoters: Transient overexpression via pCAMBIA1304; promoter not specified
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq, SRA: PRJNA559603; Iso-Seq, SRA: PRJNA559608

Regulation_Genes.Applied_Species: Orchid (Rhyncholaeliocattleya hybrid 'KOVA'); transient assay in Phalaenopsis hybrid
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: pale pink to purple-red floral coloration for pollinator attraction and ornamental value
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Activates ABP structural genes; in transient assay upregulated PeF3H to PeANS
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: ABP structural genes including F3H; F3'H; DFR; ANS
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes anthocyanin accumulation in perianths and epichile after flowering, contributing to pale pink perianths
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Late-stage anthocyanin activator associated with weak ABP activation in perianths and pale pink coloration
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Phylogenetic analysis; RNA-seq expression profiling; qRT-PCR; transient overexpression in Phalaenopsis hybrid; anthocyanin quantification; mutant expression analysis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. RcPAP2 clustered with subgroup 6 anthocyanin-related R2R3-MYBs. 2. RcPAP2 was upregulated in sepals, petals and epichile at D7, consistent with late ABP activation. 3. Transient overexpression increased anthocyanin accumulation and ABP gene expression in Phalaenopsis petals; RcPAP2 was downregulated in peloric mutant M1.
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Upregulated in perianths and epichile at D7
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Upregulated in sepals, petals, and epichile at D7
Regulation_Genes.Interacting_Proteins: bHLH; WD40 (proposed MBW complex, not directly validated)
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Likely acts in MBW complex with bHLH and WD40, inferred from discussion
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Developmental stage-specific cues after flowering; possible distinct activators or repressors not identified
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Floral developmental stage; transient Agrobacterium-mediated overexpression in Phalaenopsis petals
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: WGCNA did not detect coexpression with ABP structural genes, but expression pattern and overexpression support activator role; reduced expression in M1 correlates with reduced red coloration.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful for engineering pale pink or broader late-stage anthocyanin pigmentation in orchid perianths
Regulation_Genes.Applied_Promoters: Transient overexpression via pCAMBIA1304; promoter not specified
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq, SRA: PRJNA559603; Iso-Seq, SRA: PRJNA559608

Regulation_Genes.Applied_Species: Orchid (Rhyncholaeliocattleya hybrid 'KOVA'); transient assay in Phalaenopsis hybrid
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: yellow floral coloration for pollinator attraction and ornamental value
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Activates CBP structural genes including PSY, LCYE and BCH1
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes α-carotene and lutein accumulation and yellow pigmentation in the hypochile
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Hypochile-specific carotenoid activator linked to sustained expression of key CBP genes and highest yellow pigment accumulation
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Phylogenetic analysis; RNA-seq expression profiling; WGCNA coexpression; qRT-PCR; transient overexpression in Phalaenopsis hybrid; carotenoid quantification; mutant expression analysis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. RcPCP1 is a subgroup 21 R2R3-MYB homologous to RCP1 and highly expressed only in hypochile. 2. RcPCP1 coexpressed with BCH1s during flower development. 3. Transient overexpression increased carotenoid accumulation and upregulated PePSY, PeLCYE and PeBCH1, supporting a positive role in yellow pigmentation.
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Highly expressed only in hypochile, especially at D7-D8
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Developmental stage and lip segment identity cues; coexpression with AGL6-2 suggests developmental regulation
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Floral developmental stage; transient Agrobacterium-mediated overexpression in Phalaenopsis petals
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Designated from Unigene0031636; downregulated in peloric mutant M1 together with BCH1 and reduced yellow coloration. The article text briefly uses RcRCP1 in one sentence, but the regulator is designated RcPCP1.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: High-value target for breeding or engineering yellow orchid flowers and ornamental crops with elevated floral carotenoids
Regulation_Genes.Applied_Promoters: Transient overexpression via pCAMBIA1304; promoter not specified
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq, SRA: PRJNA559603; Iso-Seq, SRA: PRJNA559608
